description_long: This is a classic, high-backed armchair upholstered in deep brown leather with a rich, glossy finish. The backrest features a tufted design with buttons, adding a touch of elegance and traditional style. The armrests are wide, gently curved, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall structure. The seat is broad and slightly concave, providing comfortable support, while the legs are slender, curved, and made of polished wood. The rear of the chair is fully covered in leather, bordered by a decorative trim. This armchair exudes a vintage, luxurious feel, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A vintage, high-backed brown leather armchair with tufted detailing, curved wooden legs, and padded armrests. It has a glossy finish and a classic, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted leather backrest, wide padded seat, and curved armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's depth, the curve of the armrest, and the thickness of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth leather back panel and the decorative trim along the edges.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the profile of the backrest and armrest curvature.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, gently curved, integrated with wood frame
attribute_backrest_style: high, tufted, slightly winged with a scalloped top edge
